j=cn[cc]local ba=ch[ci]local ck=ch[ci-1]ci=ci-0B10 c[j]=ck(ba)else local j=cn[cc]c[j]=c[j]();end else if not((co)==(0B11101))then c[cn[cc]]=c[cn[cd]]==c[cn[cb]];else local j,ba,ck=cn[cc],cn[cd],cn[cb]local ba=bd[ba]local j=c[j]for bd=1,#ba do if j==nil then break end j=j[bc[ba[bd]]]end c[ck]=j end end end else if co>=0b1_0111 then if co>=0X19 then local j,ba=c[cn[cd]],cn[cc]c[ba+1]=j;c[ba]=j[bc[cn[cb]]];else if co<=0X17 then local j=cn[cc]local j=cn[cd]local j=j local ba=ci local j=ba-j+0X1 local bd=ch[j]bd(r(ch,j+0x1,ba))ci=j-0b1 else c[cn[cc]]=bo(bb[cn[cd]],nil,s)end end else if co<=0X15 then if co<0b1_0101 then c[cn[cc]]=bc else local j=bb[cn[cd]]local ba=j[0X1B7E]local bd=#ba local ck=v(bd)for cl=0X1,bd do local ba=ba[cl]local bd=ba[0x2]local cp=ba[0x3]if not((ba[0X1])~=(1))then if cp==0b0 then local ba=c[bd]local cq=ce[bd]if not((cq)==(ba))then ce[bd]=ba if not cq then cg=cg+0B1 cf[cg]=bd end cq=ba end ck[cl]=cq else ck[cl]=c[bd]end else local ba=m[bd]if cp==0x0 and ba[((0b1)-0x0)]then ba=ba[0B1][ba[0B10]]end ck[cl]=ba end end c[cn[cc]]=bo(j,ck,s)end else m[cn[cd]][0b1]=c[cn[cc]]end end end else if((0b0+(0b110000)))<=(co)then if co<=0b100_0010 then if(0b11_0110)>=(co)then if not((co)<(0x33))then if co>=0X35 then if co==((0X35)+0x0)then do return c[cn[cc]]end else c[cn[cc]]=c[cn[cd]]>=c[cn[cb]];end else if co<=51 then local j=cn[cd]for ba=0b1,#j do local j=j[ba]local j=bc[j]ci=ci+0B1 ch[ci]=j end else local j=cn[cc]local ba=(c[j+0x2])+(c[j])c[j]=ba if not((ba)>(c[j+0X1]))then c[cn[cb]],cm=ba,cn[cd]end end end else if not((co)<(0b110010))then c[cn[cc]]=c[cn[cd]]-c[cn[cb]];else if co~=0X31 then local j=cn[cc]for ba=0b1,#j do local j=c[j[ba]]ci=ci+0X1 ch[ci]=j end else local j=cn[cc]local ba=c[j]local bd=c[j+((0X2)-0b0)]c[j]=ba-bd;cm=cn[cd];end end end else if co<=0B11_1011 then if co>=0x3A then if co~=0x3B then local j=ch[ci]local ba=ch[ci-0x1]local bd=ch[ci-0B10]local ck=ch[ci-0b11]ci=ci-0b100 ck(bd,ba,j)else local j=cn[cc]local ba=ch[ci]local bd=ch[ci-0x1]local ck=ch[ci-((0B10)*0X1)]local cl=ch[ci-0x3]ci=ci-0X4 c[j]=cl(ck,bd,ba)end else if co<=0B11_1000 then if co==0b11_0111 then local j=cn[cc]local ba=ch[ci]ci=ci-0x1 c[j]=ba()else c[cn[cc]]=c[cn[cd]]+c[cn[cb]];end else local j=cn[cc]local j=ch[ci]local ba=ch[ci-0X1]ci=ci-2 ba(j)end end else if co>=((0X40)-0x0)then if co>=0X42 then t[c[cn[by]]]={[cc]=(cn[cc]-0X2),[cd]=(cn[cd]+0b1_1110),[cb]=(cn[cb]+0X19),[bx]=t[c[cn[by]]][bx]}else if co~=0x41 then t[c[cn[by]]]={[cc]=cn[cc],[cd]=(cn[cd]+0X17),[cb]=cn[cb],[bx]=t[c[cn[by]]][bx]}else if cn[cc]~=0x45 then local j=t[c[cn[by]]]local ba,bd,ck=j[cb],j[cd],j[cc]j[cc]=ba j[cd]=bd j[cb]=ck cn[cc]=69 end end end else if co>=0x3E then if(0b111110)>=(co)then local j=cm local ba=cn if ba[by]==0b1011_0000 then c[ba[cc]]=not c[ba[cd]];elseif ba[by]==0xCD then c[ba[cc]]=#c[ba[cd]];elseif ba[by]==0X10E then c[ba[cc]]=bc[ba[cd]];end local ba=t[(((0X1)+0X0))+(j)]if ba[by]==0xFB then c[ba[cc]]=bc[ba[cd]];elseif ba[by]==0x69 then c[ba[cc]]=c[ba[cd]][c[ba[cb]]];else c[ba[cc]]=c[ba[cd]];end local j=t[j+0b10]if j[by]==0xCB then c[j[cc]]=cj elseif j[by]==0b111_1101 then cj=c[j[cc]]else local j=j[cc]c[j]=c[j]();end cm=(0b10)+(cm)else t[c[cn[by]]]={[cc]=cn[cc],[cd]=cn[cd],[cb]=((0b100010)+(cn[cb])),[bx]=t[c[cn[by]]][bx]}end else if co<0b111101 then if cn[cd]~=0x33 then local j=t[c[cn[by]]]local ba,bd,ck=j[cb],j[cd],j[cc]j[cc]=ba j[cd]=bd j[cb]=ck cn[cd]=0x33 end else t[c[cn[by]]]={[cc]=cn[cc],[cd]=(cn[cd]-0B1_0101),[cb]=(cn[cb]+0x25),[bx]=t[c[cn[by]]][bx]}end end end end end else if(85)<=(co)then if co<=0B1011101 then if co>=0x5A then if co>=92 then if co<0x5D then local j=cm local ba=cn if ba[by]==0b10011111 then c[ba[cc]]=bc[ba[cd]];elseif ba[by]==0XA9 then cj=not cj elseif ba[by]==0x101 then end c[ba[cc]]=bo(bd,cl,s)elseif ba[by]==0B1011_0111 then c[ba[cc]]=not c[ba[cd]];else c[ba[cc]]=bc[ba[cd]];end local ba=t[j+0X4]if ba[by]==0B1011_0001 then c[ba[cc]]=c[ba[cd]][c[ba[cb]]];elseif co<=0x60 then if co<=0b1011111 then if co<=0x5E then local j=cm local ba=cn if ba[by]==0XC8 then c[ba[cc]]=#c[ba[cd]];elseif ba[by]==0B100_0010 then local bd=bb[ba[cd]]local bx=bd[0X1B7E]local ck=#bx bx[1]==0X1 then if cq==0b0 then local bx=c[ck]local cr=ce[ck]if not((cr)==(bx))then ce[ck]=bx if not cr then cg=cg+1 cf[cg]=ck end cr=bx end cl[cp]=cr else cl[cp]=c[ck]end else local bx=m[ck]if t(0b1000_0011_1100_0100,0b11)u,v=0b1011011011010101,0b1011011011010101 else if v==0x5CD6 then o[0b100][2]=r[0x1]r[0X2]=l>127 and-0b1 or 0b1 r[0B100]=if s[0B10]then s[0b10]else m*q*0b10^(-0B11_1111_1110-0B11_0100);end;elseif n==0X7FF then if q==0X0 then return m*(0b1/0b0);else return 0b0/0B0;end;end;q=q+0X2^0b11_0100 r[0b110]=if not(not s[0B100])then s[0b100]else t(0b1001_0101_0100_0100,0B100)u,v=0b1110111111001111,61391 end end else if v<-0xB372 then u,v=r[0B100],r[0B100]else u,v=r[0B11],r[0X3]end end end until v==0b10010111101011001 end)bg=nil p(o[28],0b1,function(a)local b=0B0 local c=0b1 repeat local d local e={}local i={false,false,false}local function j(k,l)i[l]=k;return i[l]end local k={}k[0X1]=0x0 k[0b10]=0b100 k[3]=0X2 local l=0X1_0359 local m=0B0 repeat if l>=0b1000_1101_1010_1010 then if l>=0X1_0BF9 then if l==0b1_0000_1011_1111_1001 then o[0X4][0X2]=e[0b1]e[0x4]=i[0x3]or j(-28852,3)l=0B1000_1101_1010_1010 else l=e[0B11]end else if l<0b1_0000_0011_0101_1001 then l=e[0B100]else d=o[0B10][0B1](a,o[0B100][2])b=b+(d>0B111_1111 and d-0b1000_0000 or d)*c m=k[1]==0b0 and 0b1_0000_1011_1111_1001 or-21510 e[0X2]=if not(not i[0B1])then i[0X1]else j(-0x5406,0x1)m,l=-15098,-15098 end end else if l>=-0X5406 then if l==-21510 then c=c*0b1000_0000 e[0b1]=o[0X4][0b10]+0x1 e[0x3]=if i[0x2]then i[0b10]else j(0b1_0000_1011_1111_1001,0X2)l=0b10011010111111010 else m,l=e[0b10],e[0x2]end else break end end until l==-28852 until(d<0x80)return b end)bh=nil p(o[0xB],0B10,function(a)local b,c local d={}local e={false,false}local function i(j,k)e[k]=j;return e[k]end local j={}j[1]=0X2 j[0x2]=0 j[0b11]=0b10 local k=0x990F local l=0b0 repeat if k>=42711 then if k<=0XA6D7 then if(b%0x2)==0B0 then return c;end;return-c-0X1;else k=d[0x1]end else if k<=-35013 then break else b=o[28][0X1](a)c=f(b/0X2)j[0b1]=(j[0X1]+0X1)%0b101 d[0b1]=e[1]or i(0XA6D7,0X1)k=0xD2D7 end end until k==-35013 end)bi=nil ca=0B1010_1000_0110_1101 else o[0b101][0x4]=y([=[7j\39*%Cpg!($M'd?"7Hs8NW"rujc-+#67*5=ETm%i+[8%i+Y3+ob@^s8Pn=s$MJK(%P0Cnj@iHd%Nd\qTtp&LAI!eqEO&753/F:OJ,!q%f%1rjG+*<LC+nKjSto?L'eg`s$QdZ%NY+-rI;mb+#6g:%s>riruX;OLCSIj6QP_o@7'pBaADnl%X#k>TgFJpA>mkK5"t0:TgOP50VLZW(r0RNUW5P>MgrfmLj4_C*od3]+!Td>6AI[&kYNEiKF/SDFNF,/TgBeMFN@9%6QP_os*pDtU&Mq83`KcYIHX$)qG<m'KFXi6#pmY[IHXL9%NR#mkV/^IKFSkL9^#<H_]1_5@7#YX'DaDV6AGjnkYQ%34`m&f+!u)s:gl\E2O%W:KaAbl0VK!l-<-@"+!u*.0VJU_3`MK.@7#_]<9Oj6a=s;EF;PJ#?k,o((/1[RJdFSc(_7YL%36cpk`A%cc&k56o]*2D`+(8Z`5c@,&+T0$a('laAr,(!JiFf<-[5p;-f]sN?$B>s8Nollk%R=4\0)R4+lXZ($c52p7E,NC:iV-lENg^I7mJ(u.#^e#66ea)Tg67W!eZ4]Ka@`2.N;87`.C5S_@kK691Yts=FV7f9PLN$<%r-NoNDC9W'V0uSYnG@QqW2O@];0n3BF-;8nl-N/?SJ"oWoqGhHsV8S'dL`kjqeB7F,eFaYu"BRg;V9gL8qS6lM9Nf$str\?,",e#oLR=H(a]oe'nK"2&f6J9ZFX[m!hC,gWDW.SO;B3iMVUcIEkm)2.gYQV1ej`hsP`MpAhs,TBJ#PWEWa6/0&l0>ddHED7=gO9Df6UoUfSd]fJFp]S"CH<FfnTrL.T=!jbPZc[>t:ub20^f#M!A@:sW`$Efj?c58FTaOem1e8gePD5E4e8"2mm!-q%kZmg&A/O;eXQI.IFEQf&/n^)6=$hO:>u40>Ps^dEWjJ+2)E_g6`aKo,_+KF10IdHuXRMDS.mfI=XErN$dd2NSM9r0SRP:3Z9$Sk.8cXh^!"0YX&5te\0WYQ/r^[.lRknKa.ME[0^]5TY!6aJd<Z<U>MUG.`fb#&\!PiLZC_MD_)O&=;!'1b/>7e$XO][6dJOqOl6q%)K2&+WZ!/m:2_+h/=kX?tOh(XhN'g_n5Go7u3'lB7K"qXJ4,G>95%Utnt:,5_)p$'OJ@_P+0eN=3t/2)U!VPU@Dhp_0IcnJU49kb(k6H."r,K3$nfDmTT+p-d,8-f?PKEO%g&^6JJ8PjgE;#r?uV&j5;.SM(D@k^Ah6NA-`XdJ5heE(JI`WWFH&t^$IL8h*i[G#CsD<r*hWfrl0aVoJ6gMD:T-E>9;)DR:++hLVn)63n[Z@i4F,NCTG0g6!HlMq!J,QL:\r&)%M)_blZnYVf[e3b[R*4"1mgJpXQR<7'j9_'U<dNpnQRh!?3orS:=5laRf!R1EA-AF-M&mB#X:If_B<f@\B.\6,(2-s$8Q:]^;6`k$6>?+e_%EqgQiiS'WTW6k;Na`8:Icmf)E=+TZra9QB&gaf\>sho,b1]7!Ch=WcXJa(W6eK,S'p^"T9?UK^N\LVB!.Es:#RD;$JCQ&3`t/4`k\<4#=DH>c3cpY_!4)\%p-PR1#rC;ZZAick-s]D\o*Jg.2G44oFWVmb8-"l>;bU:IF=BSmRc8G59+:oTTF8%0@nO:(Krm;YrEB&*cEVZC2L%Ya+rEkVa3^bV;cJ=@TW]n9Q.[-RKsecEbB+:$_,a&UKf+^%96<"Hk8bY=/$T4_8^As2q?#2*T7^8R(f2g0W=H#;U50)U*@n1Zgi+75'd'9J;ULCUp.TR.8P:rT!uaTHKbPq1=qH97Zp*&f1h&a*liX4Q=;2NI!3e!4E^C<adA((ZaW!O^S0B'ebX&I/>;e^2&7_mdfRSqf<K@9@//-%M_3hW`Z!)m%h\!lMPHh/U!(%fe?O8Nb63%]:)aFZP,Qn1-OX_gL\#,T*5Rcrk>p@:%cl'hZKEt.?+h$CiAgf&m+CbT]K z=nil p(o[0b111],0b10,function(a)local b=0 local c=0X0 for d=0,0X3 do local e=o[0X2][0x1](a,o[0x4][0B10])b=o[0B100][0X3](b,o[0B1_0101][0X2](e,0X8*d));o[0b100][0b10]=o[0b100][0x2]+0B1 end;for d=0B0,0X3 do local a=o[0X2][0b1](a,o[4][0B10])c=o[0x4][0x3](c,o[0b1_0101][0x2](a,0B1000*d));o[0b100][0x2]=o[0x4][0b10]+0B1 end;return c*0B1_0000_0000_0000_0000_0000_0000_0000_0000+b;end)ca=-31625 end end else if ca<=0xA86D then if ca<0xA86D then bm=function(...)return{...},g('#',...)end ca=0X10B8B else p(o[0x2],0B100,function(a)local
